footer.tagline: Safely transporting adopted dogs across Europe.
footer.copyright: Lilia Paws Travel. Made with ❤️ for dogs.

hero.title: Every dog deserves a
hero.subtitle: Safely transporting adopted dogs across Europe — connecting shelters with loving families, one paw at a time.

about.title: Born from a love for rescue dogs
about.p1: Lilia Paws Travel was founded in 2018 by Lilia Kovacs, a passionate animal welfare advocate who recognized a critical gap — thousands of dogs were being adopted across borders with no safe, reliable transport.
about.p2: From a one-van operation to a network spanning 18 countries and 200+ shelters, we've safely transported over 1,200 dogs and counting.

safetyFirst.title: Safety First
safetyFirst.desc: Vet-approved health certificates and constant monitoring.

weCare.title: We Care Deeply
weCare.desc: Dogs are not cargo. Comfort stops and cuddles on every trip.

fullyLegal.title: Fully Legal
fullyLegal.desc: EU pet travel compliance — microchips, passports, documents handled.

shelterPartners.title: Shelter Partners
shelterPartners.desc: We work with 200+ certified shelters and verified adopters.

step4.title: Safe Delivery
step4.desc: Your dog arrives happy and healthy.

cta.title: Ready to bring your dog home?
cta.subtitle: Submit a transport request and we'll respond within 24 hours.

contact.title: We'd love to hear from you

tripRequest.subtitle: Select a travel date, fill in your details, add your dogs, and submit.

aboutPage.heroTitle: Born from a love for rescue dogs
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Since 2018 we've been safely transporting adopted dogs across Europe — one loving journey at a time.
aboutPage.missionQuote: Dogs are not cargo. They are family waiting to arrive home — and we take that responsibility with our whole heart.
aboutPage.storyTitle: A mission that started with one van and a promise
aboutPage.storyP1: Lilia Paws Travel was founded in 2018 by Lilia Kovacs, a passionate animal welfare advocate who saw thousands of dogs adopted across European borders with no safe, humane transport solution.
aboutPage.storyP2: What began as weekend trips in a single van quickly grew into a trusted network spanning 18 countries and 200+ certified shelters. Every trip is personally overseen — no middlemen, no shortcuts.
aboutPage.storyP3: Today we're proud to have delivered over 1,200 dogs safely into the arms of their new families. Each journey is unique, and every dog's comfort comes first.

2018.title: The Beginning
2018.desc: First cross-border transport from Greece to Germany. One van, one dog, one dream.

2019.title: Network Grows
2019.desc: Partnered with 20+ shelters across 5 countries. Weekend trips became weekly routes.

2021.title: 500 Dogs Milestone
2021.desc: 500th dog safely delivered. Expanded to a fleet of climate-controlled vans.

2023.title: 18 Countries
2023.desc: Now serving adopters across 18 European countries with full EU pet travel compliance.

2025.title: 1,200+ & Counting
2025.desc: Over 1,200 dogs home safe. 100% safe arrival rate across all journeys.

aboutPage.valuesSubtitle: Every decision we make — from route planning to rest stops — is guided by these principles.

safety.title: Safety Above All
safety.desc: Vet-approved health certificates, microchip verification, and continuous monitoring on every trip.

care.title: Genuine Care
care.desc: Comfort stops, fresh water, and cuddles included. Dogs are never left unattended during transit.

legal.title: Fully EU Compliant
legal.desc: We handle all paperwork — pet passports, microchips, health certificates, and border documentation.

shelter.title: Shelter Partnerships
shelter.desc: We work exclusively with 200+ certified, ethical shelters and thoroughly verified adopters.

vehicle.title: Climate-Controlled Vans
vehicle.desc: Temperature-regulated, sanitised before and after every trip. Safe and spacious for all breed sizes.

reach.title: Pan-European Reach
reach.desc: From Greece to Germany, Spain to Sweden — we connect shelters with families across the continent.

1.quote: Lilia and her team transported our rescue pup from Romania to the Netherlands. Regular photo updates the whole way — we were so relieved. Max arrived happy and healthy!
1.name: Sophie van der Berg

2.quote: Professional, caring, and reliable. Our dog Bella came all the way from Greece. Lilia handled every document perfectly. I wouldn't trust anyone else with our girl.
2.name: Maria Papadopoulou

3.quote: We adopted a senior dog from a Spanish shelter. Lilia's team gave him the gentlest ride imaginable. He arrived calm, safe, and ready for his new life with us.
3.name: James Thornton
